product: Create alerts for anomaly detection in the Data Quality Monitoring UI (Beta)
tagline: You can now create and view alerts for anomaly detection directly in the Databricks Data Quality Monitoring UI.
what_it_does: You can now create and view alerts for anomaly detection directly in the Databricks Data Quality Monitoring UI. This feature is in Beta. This page describes how to set up and view alerts for anomaly detection.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
plain_summary: You can now create and view alerts for anomaly detection directly in the Databricks Data Quality Monitoring UI. This feature is in Beta.
key_takeaway: You can now create and view alerts for anomaly detection directly in the Databricks Data Quality Monitoring UI.
